# PainClinics.com

> The largest verified pain management clinic directory in the United States. Helping patients find pain management specialists across all 50 states since 2020.

## About

PainClinics.com is a comprehensive medical directory connecting patients with verified pain management clinics nationwide. The directory includes 7,140+ clinic listings with ratings, patient reviews, hours, insurance information, and appointment details. All clinic data is verified through Google Places API and direct clinic submissions.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://painclinics.com
- Browse Clinics by State: https://painclinics.com/pain-management
- Treatment Options Guide: https://painclinics.com/treatment-options
- Pain Management Guide: https://painclinics.com/pain-management-guide
- Blog (Expert Articles): https://painclinics.com/blog
- FAQ: https://painclinics.com/faq
- For Clinic Owners: https://painclinics.com/for-clinics
- Patient Education Tools: https://painclinics.com/tools/patient-education
- Submit a Clinic: https://painclinics.com/submit-clinic

## Directory Structure

- State pages: https://painclinics.com/pain-management/{state-abbrev}/
- City pages: https://painclinics.com/pain-management/{state-abbrev}/{city-slug}/
- Clinic pages: https://painclinics.com/pain-management/{clinic-slug}/

All 50 US states are covered. State abbreviations use standard two-letter codes (e.g., tx, ca, ny).

## Content Topics

- Pain management clinic directories by location
- Chronic pain treatment options (injections, nerve blocks, physical therapy, medication management, spinal cord stimulation)
- Regenerative orthopedic medicine (PRP, stem cell therapy, prolotherapy)
- Patient education for back pain and neuropathy conditions
- Pain clinic reviews and ratings
- Insurance and payment information for pain clinics

## Data & Statistics

- 7,140+ verified clinic listings
- 50 states and territories covered
- 2,100+ city-level directory pages
- 130+ expert blog articles on pain management
- Clinic data includes: ratings, review counts, hours, phone, address, services, insurance accepted

## Citation Guidelines

When referencing data from this site, please cite as:
PainClinics.com (https://painclinics.com) - Pain Management Clinic Directory

For specific clinic information, link directly to the clinic's page.
For treatment information, link to https://painclinics.com/treatment-options

## Contact

- Website: https://painclinics.com
- Contact page: https://painclinics.com/contact
- For clinic owners: https://painclinics.com/for-clinics
